description_long: This stuffed toy is designed to resemble a cartoonish brown bear with a rounded head, large black eyes, and a prominent black nose. It features a black top hat and a black bow tie, adding a formal and playful touch to its appearance. The bear's mouth is slightly open, showing two small white teeth, and it has rounded ears on top of its head. Its arms are outstretched horizontally, with one hand holding a black microphone, suggesting a performer or entertainer theme. The body is segmented at the joints, giving it a plush, articulated look, and the feet are oversized and rounded. The surface appears smooth and soft, typical of a plush toy, with a consistent brown color accented by black details.
description: A brown cartoon bear stuffed toy with a black top hat, bow tie, and microphone, featuring large eyes and a segmented plush body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, black top hat, bow tie, and microphone in the right hand, with both arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, showing the protruding nose, open mouth with teeth, and the microphone held forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and limbs, with the top hat and ears visible but no facial features.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the bear's profile from the opposite side, with the microphone visible in the left hand and the rounded features of the head and body.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral with large, wide-open black eyes and a slightly open mouth showing two small white teeth, giving a friendly and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, one hand holding a microphone.
